name: Load Robot Cell From Library
description: Load a pre-defined RobotCell and matching default RobotCellState from RobotCellLibrary (e.g. 'ur5', 'ur10e', 'abb_irb4600_40_255', 'panda', 'ur5_cone_tool').

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Name of the RobotCellLibrary classmethod to call. A dropdown is auto-created on first use with every available cell (e.g. 'ur5', 'ur10e', 'abb_irb4600_40_255', 'panda', 'rfl', 'ur5_cone_tool', 'abb_irb4600_40_255_printing_tool').

inputParameters.name: load_geometry
inputParameters.description: Whether to load the robot's mesh geometry. Required for visualization. Defaults to True when unwired.

inputParameters.name: reload
inputParameters.description: Force a reload (bypass cache). Defaults to False.

outputParameters.name: robot_cell_state
outputParameters.description: The default RobotCellState matching the cell.
